---
title: "Henry Plumridge"
---

## Henry Plumridge

**Dates:** (b.1811/12)

### Description

master of the Hursley village school in 1861

### Biography

In the 1871 census he is postmaster, stationer and clerk to the Board of Guardians, Hursley [White, <i>Directory of Hampshire</i>, 1878; 1861 census; 1871 census]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
